__rationale__: Triggering fixture for MR-18: Cargo size within host capacity: AAV ≤ 4.7 kb between ITRs; lentivirus ≤ ~9 kb between LTRs; baculovirus ≤ ~38 kb; E. coli high-copy ≤ ~30 kb; BAC ≤ ~300 kb.

construct.notes: T-405 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage; Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations.
